message:
chore: gitignore ephemeral agent artifacts

Add patterns for files that accumulate from multi-agent sessions:
- target_*/ — per-agent cargo build directories (target_dusty, etc.)
- brief.md, helpers.md, insights.json, meta.json, triage.json — bv
  triage auto-generated artifacts that are ephemeral and session-local
- **/proptest-regressions/ — auto-generated proptest regression files
  that are machine-specific and regenerated on failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -75,3 +75,16 @@ fuzz/artifacts/
 
 # Compiled binaries
 a.out
+
+# Agent-named target directories (concurrent agent builds)
+target_*/
+
+# bv triage artifacts (auto-generated, ephemeral)
+brief.md
+helpers.md
+insights.json
+meta.json
+triage.json
+
+# Proptest regression files (auto-generated, machine-specific)
+**/proptest-regressions/
